tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: The Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR performance indicators

tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics Reports
tool_args.raw_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.

tool_args.label: Committee Work Plan recurring description
tool_args.raw_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.

payload.claim_text: The Work Plan will list, by month, the topics scheduled for review. The Committee will be advised if any changes have been made to the plan.

tool_args.label: President's Report
tool_args.raw_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.claim_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

tool_args.label: Chief's Report (Operations)
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.

tool_args.label: Safety Report
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.

tool_args.label: MTA Police Report
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.

tool_args.label: Financial Report
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

tool_args.label: Procurements recurring agenda description
tool_args.raw_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

payload.description: A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

tool_args.label: April 2024 - May Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

tool_args.label: May 2024 - Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts.
The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.

tool_args.label: July 2024 - September Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2024 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2025 Budget.

tool_args.label: October 2024 - November Timetable Change & Fall Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators.
Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.

tool_args.label: January 2025 - Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2025 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2025 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2025 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

tool_args.label: February 2025 - March Timetable Change & Spring Trackwork Programs

payload.description: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road Committee oversees Long Island Rail Road
MTA publishes LIRR Committee Work Plan
